name: Textarea
description: Multiline text input with auto-resize option.

api.name: Textarea
api.description: Multiline text input with auto-resize option.

examples.title: With Binding
examples.code:
<Textarea Value="@_text" OnInput="@(e => _text = e.Value?.ToString() ?? "")" placeholder="Write something..." />
<Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Character count: @_text.Length</Lumeo.Text>

@code {
    private string _text = "";
}

examples.title: With Label
examples.code:
<FormField Label="Your Bio" HelpText="You can use markdown for formatting.">
    <Textarea placeholder="Tell us a little bit about yourself." rows="4" />
</FormField>

mdSummary:
# Textarea

Multiline text input with auto-resize option.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/textarea

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Textarea | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| Textarea | OnInput | `EventCallback<ChangeEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | AutoResize | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | MaxRows | `int` | `10` |  |
| Textarea | ShowCount | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | MaxLength | `int?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Resize | `TextareaResize` | `TextareaResize.Vertical` |  |
| Textarea | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
